Interface SoundInstance<SELF extends SoundInstance<SELF>>

Type Parameters:
SELF - the type of this sound instance
All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseSoundSource, StaticSoundSource, StreamingSoundSource
public interface SoundInstance<SELF extends SoundInstance<SELF>>
A playable sound instance. It has a state and may have sound effects.

This interface is implemented by the internal APIs, which expect a concrete implementation, and thus this interface must not be implemented directly or indirectly by other classes.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    SoundInstance.State
    A state of a sound instance.

    Description

    Attaches the sound effects to this sound.

    Copies the sound effects to this sound.
    SELF

    Detaches the sound effects from this sound.
    double
    effect(SoundEffect effect)
    Returns the given effect's value for this sound.

    effect(SoundEffect effect, double value)
    Sets the given effect to the given value, which is normalized according to the given effect's rules.
    SoundInstance.State
    getState()
    Returns the current state of this sound.
    default double
    pan()
    Returns the pan of this sound.
    default SELF

    Sets the pan for this sound.
    void
    pause()
    If this sound is playing, pauses it, otherwise does nothing.
    default double
    pitch()
    Returns the pitch of this sound.
    default SELF
    pitch(double newPitch)
    Sets the pitch for this sound.
    void
    play()
    If this sound is stopped, firstly rewinds it, then plays.
    void
    rewind()
    If the state of this sound is already initial, does nothing.
    default SoundInstance.State
    setState(SoundInstance.State newState)
    Calls one of the state changing methods depending on the given state enum.
    void
    stop()
    If this sound is in initial state or stopped, does nothing, otherwise stops this sound.
    default double
    volume()
    Returns the volume of this sound.
    default SELF
    volume(double newVolume)
    Sets the volume for this sound.

  • Method Details

    • play

      void play()
      If this sound is stopped, firstly rewinds it, then plays. Otherwise, if it is already playing, does nothing, otherwise plays it.

    • pause

      void pause()
      If this sound is playing, pauses it, otherwise does nothing.

    • stop

      void stop()
      If this sound is in initial state or stopped, does nothing, otherwise stops this sound.

    • rewind

      void rewind()
      If the state of this sound is already initial, does nothing. If this sound is playing or paused, firstly stops it, then rewinds it and sets the state to initial. If this sound is stopped, just sets the state to initial.

    • setState

      default SoundInstance.State setState(SoundInstance.State newState)
      Calls one of the state changing methods depending on the given state enum.
      • If the given state is SoundInstance.State.PLAYING, calls play() on this sound;
      • For SoundInstance.State.PAUSED, calls pause();
      • For SoundInstance.State.STOPPED, calls stop();
      • For SoundInstance.State.INITIAL, calls rewind().
      Parameters:
      newState - the new state
      Returns:
      the actual current state after calling the corresponding method
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the state is null

    • getState

      SoundInstance.State getState()
      Returns the current state of this sound.
      Returns:
      the current state

    • effect

      SELF effect(SoundEffect effect, double value)
      Sets the given effect to the given value, which is normalized according to the given effect's rules.
      Parameters:
      effect - the effect
      value - the new value
      Returns:
      this sound instance
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the given sound effect is null

    • volume

      default SELF volume(double newVolume)
      Sets the volume for this sound. The given new volume value is normalized according to the rules of the volume effect.
      Parameters:
      newVolume - the new volume
      Returns:
      this sound instance

    • pitch

      default SELF pitch(double newPitch)
      Sets the pitch for this sound. The given new pitch value is normalized according to the rules of the pitch effect.
      Parameters:
      newPitch - the new pitch
      Returns:
      this sound instance

    • pan

      default SELF pan(double newPan)
      Sets the pan for this sound. The given new pan value is normalized according to the rules of the pan effect.
      Parameters:
      newPan - the new pan
      Returns:
      this sound instance

    • effect

      double effect(SoundEffect effect)
      Returns the given effect's value for this sound.
      Parameters:
      effect - the effect
      Returns:
      the effect's value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the effect is null

    • volume

      default double volume()
      Returns the volume of this sound.
      Returns:
      the volume

    • pitch

      default double pitch()
      Returns the pitch of this sound.
      Returns:
      the pitch

    • pan

      default double pan()
      Returns the pan of this sound.
      Returns:
      the pan

    • copyPropertiesFrom

      SELF copyPropertiesFrom(EffectMap<? super SoundEffect> soundEffects)
      Copies the sound effects to this sound.
      Parameters:
      soundEffects - the sound effects to copy
      Returns:
      this sound instance
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the given sound effect map is null

    • attachProperties

      SELF attachProperties(EffectMap<? super SoundEffect> soundEffects)
      Attaches the sound effects to this sound. The values from this map will be copied to this sound constantly.
      Parameters:
      soundEffects - the sound effect map to listen to
      Returns:
      this sound instance
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the given sound effect map is null

    • detachProperties

      SELF detachProperties()
      Detaches the sound effects from this sound. The properties of this sound will no longer be constantly changing after calling this method.
      Returns:
      this sound instance
